name: get_patient_records
description: Retrieve patient records by patient ID. Returns the full chart including demographics, diagnoses, medications, allergies, insurance, clinical notes, and lab results.

patient_id.description: The unique ID of the patient.

include_notes.description: Ignored (notes are always included). Kept for backward compatibility.

include_lab_results.description: Ignored (lab results are always included). Kept for backward compatibility.

name: schedule_appointment
description: Schedule a medical appointment for a patient with a specified provider and department.

patient_id.description: The unique ID of the patient.

date.description: Requested appointment date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

time.description: Requested appointment time in HH:MM format.

name: prescribe_medication
description: Prescribe a medication for a patient. Records the medication name, dosage, frequency, and duration in the patient chart.

patient_id.description: The unique ID of the patient.

medication_name.description: Name of the medication to prescribe.

frequency.description: How often the medication should be taken (e.g. 'twice daily', 'every 8 hours').

duration_days.description: Duration of the prescription in days.

name: send_referral
description: Send a referral for a patient to another provider or specialist.

patient_id.description: The unique ID of the patient.

referral_to.description: Name of the provider or specialist being referred to.

include_records.description: Whether to include patient records with the referral. Default true.

name: update_chart
description: Update a patient's medical chart with new clinical notes, diagnoses, or other information.

patient_id.description: The unique ID of the patient.

note_type.description: Type of chart entry: 'progress_note', 'diagnosis', 'allergy', 'vital_signs', 'procedure', 'visit_note', 'clinical_note', 'assessment', 'follow_up', 'referral_note', 'lab_note'. Unrecognised types default to 'progress_note'.

content.description: The clinical note or update content.

name: request_lab_results
description: Request or retrieve lab test results for a patient.

patient_id.description: The unique ID of the patient.

order_new.description: If true, order a new lab test. If false, retrieve existing results. Default false.

priority.description: Priority level for new orders: 'routine', 'stat'. Default 'routine'.
